name: libxml-perl
title: libxml-perl
summary: Perl modules for working with XML
description:
Perl modules for working with XML
libxml-perl is a collection of smaller Perl modules, scripts, and
documents for working with XML in Perl.  libxml-perl software
works in combination with XML::Parser, PerlSAX, XML::DOM,
XML::Grove and others.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libxml-perl because Perl modules for working with XML.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libxml-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libxml-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libxml-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
